video_title: Attend Nevermore Academy with Wednesday Addams | Netflix
comment_text:
I would love to see a flashback series focusing on the school days of Barry. 

In how I imagined him, Barry was the introvert student that in his previous schools, he was bullied for being a big fan of Edgar Allan Poe (this is a nod to how Steve Buscemi was eventually casted as Barry because of Tim Burton drawing a sketch of Barry Dort was inspired by Edgar's physical appearance) that the normies would rather not give a care about and when he enrolled to Nevermore Academy, he brought all of his book collection of Edgar's famous literary works and I wish that throughout the prequel series, Barry's strength comes from his love for studying the masterpieces of many famous authors. Also his fashion style consists lots and lots of purple color 

The reason why this is my head-canon is that I think it would be cool to see a younger version of Barry being so competent in the field of academics (Mike Wazowski) but also being a socially awkward (Randall Boggs) in things that are unrelated to academics.
